It's bad. We've started getting tickets from the EU region, customers saying they can't complete purchases, they get to the payment screen, but it fails to process
No new orders have been processed in the UK region for the last 10 minutes
UK is our biggest market, accounting for 35% of our user base
We've received over 380+ complaints in that time period, all with the same failure symptoms
Social media is picking up on it too, mentions on Twitter and Reddit saying 'Checkout is broken'
We're not seeing the issue outside the UK.  Other regions seem to be unaffected
How is our customers doing? Let's put out a post letting them know we are investigating
